hero.title: Where clinical craft meets practical innovation.
hero.subtitle: A single-day aesthetic medicine conference by Yasa Laser at The Quay — Gala room.

about.title: Founded by leaders. Focused on what works.
about.lead: Presented by Yasa Laser — a conference built by Canadian R&D and clinical leaders who prioritize outcomes over hype.
about.body: Innovate is founded by Dr. Arjang Yazdani, FRCSC, and Nadine Sabino, RN — pioneers in aesthetic laser medicine, provider training, and clinical innovation across Canada. Their work spans advanced energy-based treatments, surgical and non-surgical care, and national education for aesthetic teams.
about.bodySecondary: Every session at Innovate reflects a results-first philosophy: procedures and protocols that work, taught through case-based learning and practical insight you can apply immediately. No filler — just focused education for clinicians and operators who care about measurable outcomes.
highlights: Built for teams who care about outcomes
about.imageAlt: Clinician reviewing laser treatment outcomes on a tablet in a modern aesthetic clinic

experience.title: Explore the program
experience.intro: Review the draft schedule, meet the faculty, and connect with sponsors.

items.title: Schedule
items.description: A full day of clinical sessions, workshops, and networking—from registration to closing reception.

items.title: Speakers
items.description: Meet confirmed keynote faculty — Dr. Arjang Yazdani and Nadine Sabino, RN — with more announcements coming soon.

items.title: Sponsors
items.description: Six confirmed industry partners — including Sciton, Cynosure, Allergan, and Alastin — with additional sponsorship packages available.

agenda.title: Draft agenda
agenda.intro: Session times and faculty are subject to change. A finalized schedule will be published before registration closes.

venue.title: The Quay — Gala room
venue.intro: Innovate takes place in the Gala room at The Quay—a waterfront venue with expansive windows, natural wood accents, and room for focused programming and networking.

cta.title: Don't miss the experience
cta.body: Reserve your seat for a focused day of clinical education, operational insight, and networking at The Quay.
